reasoning: The market probability on Manifold is 0.57 as of early April 2026. The Veritasium video has not yet been released. The 1750 fixed estimate on Manifold appears to have an edge against the crowd estimate, partially due to speculation that the crowd-sourced data will be distorted by troll answers (like "69") or that humans consistently underestimate jelly beans in jars, while Manifold's own high-res market estimate is around 1639. If the actual count is around 1600-1650 and the true crowd underestimates significantly, 1750 could be closer.
